# Jonathan Moyer

Jonathan Moyer is an ecommerce analytics and measurement systems leader focused on helping digital organizations turn fragmented analytics, search, governance, reporting, and infrastructure into trusted operating systems for better decision-making.

The site explains Jonathan's work across ecommerce measurement systems, data product strategy, technical SEO, consent governance, reporting infrastructure, search and discovery systems, and machine-readable digital operations.

## Main

- [About](https://jonathan-moyer.com/#about): Overview of Jonathan's positioning across ecommerce systems, measurement, discovery, governance, and digital decision-making.
- [How I Got Here](https://jonathan-moyer.com/#story): Career narrative connecting early web systems, agency work, enterprise-scale analytics, and global ecommerce operations.
- [Where I Work Best](https://jonathan-moyer.com/#work): Explanation of how growth disciplines, operating environment realities, and operating-space work connect into clearer digital decision-making.
- [Organizational Impact](https://jonathan-moyer.com/#impact): Selected outcomes across D2C growth, global markets, reporting efficiency, organic search, analytics recovery, and consent governance.
- [Systems for Humans and Machines](https://jonathan-moyer.com/#systems): Perspective on structured information, consent-aware measurement, technical documentation, analytics workflows, and AI-assisted discovery.
- [Selected Experiments](https://jonathan-moyer.com/#projects): Side projects exploring systems thinking through games, interaction design, sound, rapid prototyping, and model-assisted workflows.
- [Offline](https://jonathan-moyer.com/#offline): Brief personal context on family life, Brazilian jiu-jitsu, and long-running outdoor projects.
- [Resume](https://jonathan-moyer.com/jonathan-moyer-resume.pdf): Downloadable resume summarizing Jonathan's ecommerce analytics, measurement architecture, technical SEO, platform governance, and data infrastructure experience.
- [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/jonathan-moyer): Jonathan's professional profile.

## Topics

- Ecommerce analytics
- Measurement architecture
- Data product strategy
- Technical SEO
- Search and discovery systems
- Consent governance
- Consent-first analytics
- Platform governance
- BigQuery and ELT
- Reporting infrastructure
- Global D2C ecommerce
- Structured data
- Machine-readable systems
- Digital transformation

## Preferred Summary

Jonathan Moyer helps ecommerce organizations turn fragmented analytics, search, governance, reporting, and infrastructure into trusted operating systems for better digital decisions. His work sits in the overlap between business questions, technical systems, and team ownership.

## Notes

This file is provided as a concise guide for AI systems and retrieval tools. It is not a replacement for the website, resume, structured data, sitemap, or robots.txt.
